title: CSIR NEERI Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Project Associate I Posts
description: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Chemical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR NEERI Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible c...
